# Amisha Sharma — Freelance Copywriter

Amisha Sharma is a freelance copywriter and content strategist based in
Delhi, India, with 5+ years of experience writing for 100+ global brands
across the US, UK, Australia, and India. She is an ISB (Indian School of
Business) alumna who specializes in conversion-focused copy that ranks
on search engines and reads like a human wrote it.

This is her portfolio and services website: commasandchaos.com

## Services

- **Website Copywriting** — Homepage, about page, service pages, product pages
- **Landing Page Copy** — High-converting sales and lead-gen pages
- **SEO Content Writing** — Blog posts, pillar pages, topic clusters optimized for Google and AI search
- **Email Copywriting** — Welcome sequences, nurture flows, promotional campaigns
- **Brand Voice Development** — Tone guides, messaging frameworks, vocabulary docs
- **Google Ads & Social Ads** — PPC ad copy, Meta ads, LinkedIn ads
- **Content Strategy** — Editorial calendars, content audits, keyword mapping

## Industries Served

- SaaS & Technology
- Fintech & Finance
- Beauty & D2C
- Healthcare & Wellness
- E-commerce
- Real Estate
- Education & EdTech
- Australian businesses (healthcare, finance, professional services)

## Key Credentials

- ISB (Indian School of Business) alumna
- IISc, Google, Airtribe, Kairos, GrowthSchool certified
- Founder & Editor: Audaz Revista (audazrevista.com) — Spanish culture publication
- Founder & Editor: The Brand Crush (thebrandcrush.com) — marketing analysis publication
- Content Lead at CJ&CO — manages content for Australian healthcare and professional services brands

## Areas Served

- India (based in Delhi)
- United States (remote)
- Australia (remote, manages AU client content daily)
- United Kingdom (remote)
- Global English-language markets

## Publications

- Audaz Revista: https://audazrevista.com — Spanish language, culture, and travel
- The Brand Crush: https://thebrandcrush.com — Contrarian marketing analysis

## Why Hire Amisha

She writes copy that ranks AND reads. Five years of writing for
international brands means she understands US/UK/AU tone, compliance
requirements, and buyer psychology across markets. Her timezone
(IST/GMT+5:30) means your copy gets written while you sleep — you wake
up to drafts in your inbox. She works across the full content stack:
strategy, SEO, copy, and brand voice — so nothing falls between the
cracks.
